meaning: n.(苏格兰)甜面包,(美国)小甜饼,一种网络服务器传递给浏览器的信息
examples: Heart-shaped cookie cutters come in many sizes.
A balanced diet is a cookie in each hand.
When I gave my son a cookie, he was happy.
For years, a holiday in the Dominican Republic entailed staying at a walled-in, cookie-cutter resort.
The idea is to indigenize engineering and make the process cookie-cutter to reduce cost.
